name: Tomato French Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook onion in butter until tender.
2. Drain tomatoes, reserving liquid. Chop the tomatoes; add them, reserved liquid, 2 cups water, consomme, and sherry to onions. Bring to boil, skimming off foam.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Place soup in four broilerproof bowls, top with bread and cheeses, and broil until cheese is melted and golden.
